title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that enables anyone to build software through conversation without requiring an engineering team. Launched two months prior to this video, it reached millions of users. Anton Osika emphasizes trust as a key competitive advantage in AI, achieved through partnership with Anthropic and embedding dedicated people in the development process.
